# Semantic conventions for ThousandEyes logs events

This page documents event semantic conventions for ThousandEyes logs.

## Activity Log

### Event: `thousandeyes.activity.log`
<!-- semconv event.thousandeyes.activity.log -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

The event name MUST be `thousandeyes.activity.log`.

Activity log records emitted by ThousandEyes.

This log record uses the standard OpenTelemetry log fields `Body`, `Timestamp`, `ObservedTimestamp`, `SeverityText`, and `SeverityNumber`.


The event SHOULD be associated with one of the following entities:

- `thousandeyes.stream`

- `thousandeyes.account`


**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`thousandeyes.activitylog.resources`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The comma-separated list of ThousandEyes Platform resources associated with the action tracked by the log. | `test:1234,agent:5678` |
| [`thousandeyes.user.address`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The IP address of the user that performed the action tracked by the log. | `203.0.113.10` |
| [`thousandeyes.user.email`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The email of the user that performed the action tracked by the log. | `jane.doe@example.com` |
| [`thousandeyes.user.id`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The ID of the user that performed the action tracked by the log. | `123456` |
| [`thousandeyes.user.name`](attributes/thousandeyes.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the user that performed the action tracked by the log. | `jane.doe` |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endsemconv -->
